config.exam_name: 47 AIBI Genie Space in Databricks

question.line: What is the primary purpose of AI/BI Genie Spaces in Databricks?

options.A: To automatically create Delta Live Tables pipelines
options.B: To allow business users to query data using natural language instead of writing SQL
options.C: To replace SQL Warehouses with Spark clusters
options.D: To automatically optimize Unity Catalog permissions
options.E: To schedule notebook execution using Workflows

question.line: When a user asks a question in plain English, what sequence of actions does Genie perform?

options.A: Creates a Delta table, refreshes a Materialized View, and publishes a dashboard
options.B: Generates SQL, executes it on a SQL Warehouse, and returns results with tables and visualizations
options.C: Converts the question into Python code and runs it on a cluster
options.D: Exports the data to Excel before displaying results
options.E: Creates a new Unity Catalog schema automatically

question.line: Which SQL Warehouse types are supported by AI/BI Genie?

options.B: SQL Warehouse Pro and SQL Warehouse Serverless

question.line: Which type of information does Genie primarily use to understand the meaning of user questions?

options.C: Metadata such as table descriptions, column comments, dataset names, and relationships

question.line: What is the purpose of configuring Example Values in a Genie Space?

options.B: To improve AI interpretation of user questions by providing representative data values

question.line: Why would you add custom instructions to a Genie Space?

options.A: To change Unity Catalog permissions automatically
options.B: To teach Genie organization-specific terminology, abbreviations, and business language
options.D: To replace the need for metadata descriptions

question.line: What does the Show Code option allow users to do?

options.C: Inspect the generated SQL, including filters, joins, and aggregations

question.line: Which capability does Genie provide in addition to returning query results?

options.B: Automatic visualizations such as bar charts, pie charts, and trend charts
options.C: Automatic creation of Delta Live Tables pipelines

question.line: What information is available in the Monitoring tab of a Genie Space?

options.C: Questions asked, generated SQL, users, and query history

question.line: Which permissions are required for business users to successfully use a shared Genie Space?

options.A: Only Can Run permission on the Genie Space
options.C: Genie Space access, dataset permissions (USE CATALOG, USE SCHEMA, SELECT), and Can Use permission on the SQL Warehouse
options.D: Cluster creation permission and notebook editing access
